query: SELECT fo.id, fo.fieldId, fo.value, fo.label, ff.field_key, ff.field_type FROM field_options fo JOIN form_fields ff ON fo.field_id = ff.id WHERE ff.field_key LIKE '%site%' OR ff.field_key LIKE '%location%' LIMIT 20;
